guidance: Keep visual components pure and prop-driven
Split expensive lists and charts
Use existing component and token conventions before adding UI primitives
Keep route shells and loading/error states explicit
Prefer server components for static content and data shells
Use client components only for interaction-heavy UI
Use scoped components and composables for view logic
Keep Pinia/global state out of purely local UI state
Preserve SFC style boundaries
Use layouts for persistent UI chrome
Align useFetch/useAsyncData states with loading and error UI
Keep route middleware separate from component display logic
Use component-local reactivity for UI state
Keep transitions meaningful and reduced-motion aware
Avoid global stores for local interaction state
Use islands only where interaction is needed
Keep marketing content fast and mostly static
Prioritize image optimization and content hierarchy
Prefer standalone components
Keep templates declarative
Use CDK/a11y patterns for overlays and focus
Respect safe areas and platform gestures
Use 44/48px touch targets
Test dynamic type and screen reader labels
Prefer composition with small widgets
Use theme tokens instead of per-screen styles
Respect platform text scaling and safe areas
Make the primary scene full-bleed when it is the experience
Provide DOM controls and accessible summaries
Verify canvas is nonblank and resources dispose cleanly
Use shadcn components as accessible primitives
Map theme variables before custom styling
Avoid arbitrary utility soup when a token exists
Keep mobile-first utilities
Extract repeated class patterns into components
Use semantic CSS variables for theme-critical color
